scope: sitewide public content correction proposal only; no HTML edited

research_basis.finding: Specific Tyrant reward references emphasize alliance/personal damage rewards, Power Cores, Enhancement Alloy, speedups, Hero EXP, normal resources, Gift Vouchers, and diamonds. They do not support treating Tyrant as a confirmed Steel source.

proposed_file_changes.summary: Remove Tyrant from Steel title/meta/H1/quick answer/source list/FAQ and position confirmed Steel sources as bounties, Steel Mine/nodes, Hub Shop, Furylord, events, and launch rewards.
Reposition Tyrant as alliance rally / damage-tier / Power Core event, not Steel reward source.
Correct Steel source quick answer, source tables, How to Get Steel section, and FAQ.
Remove Steel from Tyrant Power Core tip.
Remove Steel claim from Tyrant boss-fight checklist.
Correct home cards for Tyrant and Steel so they route distinct intents.

acceptance_checks: manual review: visible FAQ and JSON-LD FAQ answers match on steel.html, tyrant.html, and resources.html
manual review: no page says Tyrant is a confirmed Steel source
manual review: home cards still route to tyrant.html and steel.html with distinct page roles
safety: No public content, patch specs, backlog rows, manifests, PRs, or production files were modified by this proposal.
